com.android.decode.configuration

Рр PostalKix

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.android.device.configuration.PropertyGroup
      • com.android.decode.configuration.SymbologyBase
        • com.android.decode.configuration.PostalKix

  • public class PostalKix
extends SymbologyBase
    PostalKix is the class that configures the Postal Kix.

    • зжЖЮИХвЊ

    • ЙЙдьЦїЯъЯИзЪСЯ

      • PostalKix

        public PostalKix(PropertyGetter editor)
        This is the constructor of PostalKix. All symbology options are initialized by editor.
        ВЮЪ§:
        editor - A PropertyGetter used to load the current barcode family.
